source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for high-signal product UI, Inter Bold for compact dashboard headings, Geist Mono for tables and metrics, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, labels, and status text.
layout: Dense dashboard grids, cobalt action rails, black spot dividers, yellow focus rings, rainforest-green status chips, compact tables, direct forms, command search, 8px radii, and glossy wet-skin texture samples.

prompts.label: Transparent poison dart frog motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Poison Dart Frog transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated poison dart frog motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single realistic dart frog with accurate amphibian anatomy, compact crouched posture, glossy cobalt blue body, deep black irregular warning markings, bright golden yellow patches on limbs and back, subtle leaf-green rainforest reflected accents along underside and toe pads, high-signal interface system mood, crisp silhouette edges, and natural wet-skin detail. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full frog, head, eyes, back, limbs, toes, and belly contour without cropping. Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Constraints: no leaf as main subject, no rainforest scene, no second frog, no toy, no cartoon mascot, no text, no watermark. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Poison Dart Frog light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent poison dart frog motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Poison Dart Frog", derived from the visible transparent poison dart frog cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Poison Dart Frog, Poison Dart Frog, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from electric cobalt blue skin, deep black warning spots, bright dart-yellow markings, glossy amphibian highlights, leaf green rainforest floor accents, damp graphite shadows, and clean high-signal contrast. UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, left sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, form panel, status timeline, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Style: high-signal interface system, shadcn/tweakcn-style, precise grid, 8px radius, crisp black dividers, cobalt primary actions, yellow warning/focus rings, leaf-green success states, wet-skin speckle texture, strong readable hierarchy, not a marketing page. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; avoid generic purple gradients and unrelated saturated colors. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Poison Dart Frog" or "Poison Dart Frog", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Poison Dart Frog dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent poison dart frog motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Poison Dart Frog". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible poison dart frog cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Poison Dart Frog, Poison Dart Frog, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background derived from wet black warning markings and rainforest floor shadows; foreground from clean mist white; primary actions from electric cobalt blue; alert/focus from dart yellow; success and environmental states from leaf green; surfaces from graphite, charcoal, and deep midnight blue; borders from glossy black speckles; wet-skin highlight texture overlays. UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, forms, tables, status timeline, empty/loading/error states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Style: high-signal dark interface system, shadcn/tweakcn-style, precise grid, 8px radius, crisp cobalt focus rings, yellow warning chips, leaf-green success states, black dividers, glossy amphibian signal texture, readable hierarchy. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Poison Dart Frog" or "Poison Dart Frog", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
